translations.An error occurred while recording your r: An error occurred while recording your response. Please try again.
translations.This link is invalid. Please use the lin: This link is invalid. Please use the link from your notification.
translations.This link has expired. The appointment h: This link has expired. The appointment has already ended.
This link is no longer valid.
translations.Please respond to the upcoming appointme: Please respond to the upcoming appointment!
translations.A new appointment has been created. Plea: A new appointment has been created. Please respond soon.
translations.Please check the new appointments and re: Please check the new appointments and respond.
translations.Please respond! We still need your answe: Please respond! We still need your answer.
Login timed out. Please try again.
translations.Complete the login in your browser: Complete the login in your browser
translations.After granting access, return to this ap: After granting access, return to this app
translations.Enter the domain of your Nextcloud serve: Enter the domain of your Nextcloud server to get started.
translations.Nextcloud is not fully installed on this: Nextcloud is not fully installed on this server
translations.Are you sure you want to log out?: Are you sure you want to log out?
translations.Subscribe to your appointments in extern: Subscribe to your appointments in external calendar apps like Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Thunderbird.
translations.Keep this URL private! Anyone with this: Keep this URL private! Anyone with this link can see your appointments.
translations.This will invalidate your current calend: This will invalidate your current calendar subscription URL. Any calendar apps using the old URL will need to be updated with the new URL.
translations.This appointment is part of a series of: This appointment is part of a series of {count} appointments. How would you like to apply this change?
translations.Do you want to delete this appointment?: Do you want to delete this appointment?
Select at least one day of the week.
translations.Please enter an occurrence count greater: Please enter an occurrence count greater than 0.
translations.Please select an end date for recurrence: Please select an end date for recurrence.
End date must be after the start date.
translations.Set a start date first to enable recurre: Set a start date first to enable recurrence.
translations.When applying to multiple appointments,: When applying to multiple appointments, date and time changes are applied as a relative shift. For example, moving the start time by one hour will shift all affected appointments by one hour.
translations.Select calendar events to import as appo: Select calendar events to import as appointments.
translations.No events found in this date range: No events found in this date range
translations.Add a comment for this check-in …: Add a comment for this check-in …
translations.Reminders are sent to users in the group: Reminders are sent to users in the groups configured under "Response summary groups" and "Response summary teams". If an appointment has restricted access, only users matching that restriction will be reminded.
translations.Select which groups to include in respon: Select which groups to include in response summaries. Users outside these groups will appear under Others. Leave empty to include all groups.
translations.Select which teams to include in respons: Select which teams to include in response summaries. Team members will be grouped together like regular groups.
translations.Configure which groups can perform speci: Configure which groups can perform specific actions. Users must belong to at least one of the selected groups to access the feature. If no group is selected, all users have access to the feature.
translations.Groups that can create, update, and dele: Groups that can create, update, and delete appointments
translations.Groups that can access the check-in inte: Groups that can access the check-in interface and execute check-ins
translations.Groups that can see the response summary: Groups that can see the response summary and check-in summary
translations.Groups that can see comments in the resp: Groups that can see comments in the response overview
translations.Groups that can self-check-in via NFC st: Groups that can self-check-in via NFC sticker or deep link
translations.The Notifications app is not enabled. Pl: The Notifications app is not enabled. Please enable it to use appointment reminders.
translations.You can enable it in the Apps section of: You can enable it in the Apps section of your Nextcloud settings.
translations.Send reminders this many days before the: Send reminders this many days before the appointment (1-30 days)
translations.How often to remind users who haven't re: How often to remind users who haven't responded. Set to 0 to only remind once, or 1-30 to repeat reminders every N days.
translations.As soon as the background job has run fo: As soon as the background job has run for the first time, the next approximate run time will be displayed here.
translations.The reminder window for this appointment: The reminder window for this appointment has already passed.
translations.No upcoming appointments. The preview wi: No upcoming appointments. The preview will appear when an appointment is scheduled.
translations.Automatically update attendance appointm: Automatically update attendance appointments when their linked calendar events are modified.
translations.Calendar sync requires Nextcloud 32 or n: Calendar sync requires Nextcloud 32 or newer.
translations.This feature uses calendar event hooks t: This feature uses calendar event hooks that are only available in Nextcloud 32 and later versions.
translations.When enabled, changes to calendar events: When enabled, changes to calendar events will automatically update linked attendance appointments (title, description, date/time).
translations.Choose how appointments are displayed ac: Choose how appointments are displayed across the app.
translations.Show appointment name prominently, with: Show appointment name prominently, with date below
translations.Show date and time prominently, with nam: Show date and time prominently, with name below
translations.Hurray! You responded to all appointment: Hurray! You responded to all appointments.
translations.Please select a start date and time: Please select a start date and time
translations.Please select an end date and time: Please select an end date and time
translations.End date must be after start date: End date must be after start date
translations.This appointment is linked to a calendar: This appointment is linked to a calendar event.
translations.Changes to the calendar event will autom: Changes to the calendar event will automatically overwrite title, description, and date/time of this appointment.
translations.Changes to the calendar event will not b: Changes to the calendar event will not be synced.
translations.This appointment is part of a series. Wh: This appointment is part of a series. When saving, you can choose to apply changes to this appointment only, this and future appointments, or all appointments in the series.
translations.Notify users who can see this appointmen: Notify users who can see this appointment about its creation
translations.Files that are important for this appoin: Files that are important for this appointment can be selected here.
translations.Limits who can see this appointment. Lea: Limits who can see this appointment. Leave empty for all users.
translations.This appointment is way in the future: This appointment is way in the future
translations.This appointment is way in the past: This appointment is way in the past
translations.Do you want to set {count} users to {act: Do you want to set {count} users to {action}?
translations.Try adjusting your search or filter: Try adjusting your search or filter
translations.Do you want to reset the check-in for th: Do you want to reset the check-in for this appointment? This will remove all check-in entries.
translations.You are about to respond with: {response: You are about to respond with: {response}
translations.There are no appointments happening righ: There are no appointments happening right now.
translations.Select the appointment you want to check: Select the appointment you want to check into:
translations.Approximately {datetime}. The exact time: Approximately {datetime}. The exact time depends on when the server background job runs.
